sub_problems: Define an activation 'feature' as a fixed direction in residual stream and measure its amplitude profile over token positions; this is the wavefunction analog whose support quantifies localization.

Construct a perturbation protocol that tunes 'disorder' (e.g., random token swaps, controlled prompt heterogeneity, noise injection) and measure how the feature's localization length responds; identify a critical disorder strength (a mobility edge analog).

Cross-validate by checking that 'localized' features correspond to brittle behaviors (template-bound completions, memorized strings) and 'extended' features correspond to robust generalization across contexts.
